GrindStreaks: Lightning icons on TAB show consecutive login days. Longer streaks make the icon more intense and red.
LotteryCmd: Type .lottery to customize your experience and learn more about the lottery.
Discord: Join our Discord for surveys and updates: https://discord.hsmania.net
Store: Type .sklepsms or visit https://hsownia.sklepcs.pl to buy items.
JoinVol: Support our growth and apply to be a volunteer at https://join.hsmania.net
